# Williams Maikol Bouzid

Engineering and research portfolio focused on signal processing, radar and sonar, statistical detection, computer vision, control, embedded systems, simulation, biomechanics and applied research.

Canonical website: https://williamsbouzid59-boop.github.io/
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/williams-maikol-bouzid-5604a2237
Contact: mailto:williamsbouzid59@gmail.com

## Main areas
- Signal processing
- Radar and sonar
- Statistical detection and estimation
- Computer vision
- Control systems
- Embedded systems
- Biomechanical simulation and OpenSim
- Industrial research and forecasting
